| `sll` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \,<<\, rs2[4:0]$ | shift left logical | R |
| `slli` | `rd, rs1, shamt` | $rd = rs1 \,<<\, shamt$ | shift left logical | I |
| `srl` | (zeros) `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \,>>\, rs2[4:0]$ | shift right logical | R |
| `srli` | (zeros) `rd, rs1, shamt` | $rd = rs1 \,>>\, shamt$ | shift right logical | I |
